{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315493257630AF9356D28989937"}"},"total":85},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7597359282629411608","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完到最新了，追评一下，决斗很精彩，有种连续看很多集游戏王高燃视频的感觉，但作为小说，阴间陷阱卡组看着始终不是那么痛快，且世界观和主线的插入，都太，突兀？或者说决斗和决斗之间都太紧了，突然插入一段那种世界观，就很强行。。而且感觉和隔壁牢白的新书一样，感觉缺乏决斗的信念和理由，感觉就是纯粹为了决斗而决斗，这种原创世界观完全可以让主角在决斗上背负上更多的“不得不赢的理由”。。不过当成纯决斗文来看的话还是很享受的，完全值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768901668,"group_id":"7504676497098017816","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2188493757617939"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504676497098017816","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"199"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7683,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7597320548526342936","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊，决斗，美味，终于有了第二本能看的游戏王了。。虽然剧情和文笔都差点意思但决斗写得挺精彩的，最关键的是原创世界观，天天看那些穿进动画的我都要看吐了，去古早版本欺负一群原始人是何意为啊？虽然目前看的阴间牌组不是很喜欢，确实是在决斗决斗决斗之后第二本在🍅能看得下去的游戏王了（其实还有个游戏降临的，但那本不算游戏王）","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"游戏王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425217228989937%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597320548526342936%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504676497098017816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":86,"s":83,"text":"原始人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425217228989937%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597320548526342936%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504676497098017816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":146,"s":142,"text":"游戏降临","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E9%99%8D%E4%B8%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425217228989937%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597320548526342936%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504676497098017816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E9%99%8D%E4%B8%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768896621,"group_id":"7504676497098017816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxKY4Z4lk+7sTViCHic0/Hjh/MrP6GtOv6uBtJt3sUfM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2188493757617939","user_name":"用户21884937"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2188493757617939","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504676497098017816","book_info":{"abstract":"【原创世界＋不开挂＋不无脑＋不斧王＋不取对象】
游戏王骨灰级玩家凌墨阴差阳错穿越到了游戏王的世界，竟变成了决斗都市最底层的一位边缘民。
面对对手全军压境，凌墨翻开怪兽卡将其怪兽全部破坏……
面对对手怪兽林立，凌墨翻开魔法卡将其怪兽全部破坏……
面对对手拼尽全力清空自己场面，凌墨翻开陷阱卡还是将其怪兽全部破坏……
只见他的对手被炸得晕头转向，满脑子只剩下凌墨的那句——全☆部☆破☆坏！！！
撒，给这个决斗世界带来一点小小的阴间震撼吧！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/58229da337a757db6c0523759d975e66~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"深渊狩猎","author_id":"","book_id":"7504676497098017816","book_name":"游戏王：终焉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7354人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7504676504287068696","read_count":"7354","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"346975"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"168","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/58229da337a757db6c0523759d975e66~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436172&x-signature=6lIaXFTzoH77pNVJH7Cw2ETwr1M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3723416868751264","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"96"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315493257630AF9356D28989937"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3856,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":675},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1768929479,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565549360088499006","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮好，比起大部分游戏王同人都要好很多，决斗不会很拖沓，就比如说发动一张牌能写几页那种……剧情上也可以，就看后期世界观完全铺开之后了。","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"游戏王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425217228989937%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227565549360088499006%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504676497098017816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761493440,"group_id":"7504676497098017816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0N8uHg8A/B/3HcohZRyUiEbyL0WPFTDWeT9Jg4gaA+F","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d8b39cf893964bfabd94437cc0720102~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790648&x-signature=rhJGpa0spZv%2FHFZeu2iqOYH9FE4%3D","user_id":"3051895484330781","user_name":"超甜的青柠哒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3051895484330781","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504676497098017816","book_info":{"abstract":"【原创世界＋不开挂＋不无脑＋不斧王＋不取对象】
